'''tabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:graphically|graphically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graphically|graphically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tabate|tabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tabatesher|tabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tabatesherĂ«m|tabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tabatero|tabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tabateshĂ«|tabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tabateshĂ«m|tabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitabatero|gokitabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitabateshĂ«|gokitabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitabateshĂ«m|gokitabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotabankerom|gotabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotabankeshĂ«|gotabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotabankeshĂ«m|gotabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotabankeya|gotabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tabaterom|tabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tabatemu|tabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tabateya|tabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitabaterom|gokitabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitabatemu|gokitabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitabateya|gokitabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tababate|tababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tababatesher|tababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tababatesherĂ«m|tababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tababatero|tababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tababateshĂ«|tababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tababateshĂ«m|tababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitababatero|gokitababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitababateshĂ«|gokitababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitababateshĂ«m|gokitababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotababankerom|gotababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotababankeshĂ«|gotababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotababankeshĂ«m|gotababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotababankeya|gotababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tababaterom|tababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tababatemu|tababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tababateya|tababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitababaterom|gokitababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitababatemu|gokitababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitababateya|gokitababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠte|tĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠtesher|tĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠtero|tĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠbĂŠtero|gokitĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠterom|tĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠtemu|tĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠbĂŠteya|tĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠbĂŠterom|gokitĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠbĂŠteya|gokitĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafbafte|tafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafbaftesher|tafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafbaftesherĂ«m|tafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafbaftero|tafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafbafteshĂ«|tafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafbafteshĂ«m|tafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafbaftero|gokitafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafbafteshĂ«|gokitafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafbafteshĂ«m|gokitafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafbafnkerom|gotafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafbafnkeshĂ«|gotafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafbafnkeshĂ«m|gotafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafbafnkeya|gotafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafbafterom|tafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafbaftemu|tafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafbafteya|tafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafbafterom|gokitafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafbaftemu|gokitafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafbafteya|gokitafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
